subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Thy services during the imprisonment of his honor Ismu'llah were accepted and approved in the Kingdom of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه خدماتت در زمان زندان حضرت اسم الله در ملکوت قبول مقبول افتاد و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @eulogies; reminiscences
